category_sources: source_facts.description says it generates a Go ORM tailored to a database schema; official GitHub README describes SQLBoiler as a Go ORM generator.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sqlboiler; official documentation and repository use SQLBoiler capitalization.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface; pkg.go.dev provides generated Go API documentation. GitHub currently redirects the repository to aarondl/sqlboiler.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/volatiletech/sqlboiler, so repo is null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Go ORM generation from database schema; source_facts.executables lists sqlboiler and database drivers; official README covers generated ORM usage.
